channel.title: Forge
channel.description: Updates for Forge — agent-first development workbench from Coursion.

item.title: Version 0.4.1
item.description:
_2026-06-04_
- **Worktree badge** — Every terminal header and the workspace toolbar now show the active git branch and worktree at a glance, targeting the focused terminal. - **Per-terminal worktree toggle** — Enable or disable isolated worktree mode for the focused terminal straight from the toolbar. - **Reliable git detection** — Reworked git invocation to exec directly with a composed PATH and retry transient spawn failures, fixing flaky branch/worktree detection under load. - **Faster dev loop** — Reliable rebuild-and-relaunch flow with InjectionIII hot reload.

item.title: Version 0.4.0
item.description:
_2026-06-04_
- **Worktree badge** — Every terminal header and the workspace toolbar now show the active git branch and worktree at a glance, targeting the focused terminal. - **Per-terminal worktree toggle** — Enable or disable isolated worktree mode for the focused terminal straight from the toolbar. - **Reliable git detection** — Reworked git invocation to exec directly with a composed PATH and retry transient spawn failures, fixing flaky branch/worktree detection under load. - **Faster dev loop** — Reliable rebuild-and-relaunch flow with InjectionIII hot reload.

item.title: Version 0.3.0
item.description:
_2026-06-02_
- **In-app updates** — Forge now checks for, downloads, and installs new versions itself via Sparkle. Auto-check and auto-download are toggleable in Settings, with last-checked status and a one-click Check for Updates. - **What's New** — A release-notes modal driven by the bundled changelog greets you after each update, with an icon-row layout that turns each highlight into a glanceable card. - **Selectable terminal output** — Select and copy text from a terminal while a command is still streaming. - **Pane & terminal rename** — Give any pane or terminal a custom name straight from its tab. - **Workspace icon picker** — Choose from 103 SF Symbols when customizing a workspace. - **Settings refresh** — Branded toggles and segmented pickers throughout, a dedicated Coach tab, and collapsible cards to cut first-glance clutter.

item.title: Version 0.2.0
item.description: Planning board: per-workspace Trello-style kanban with AI fill, live two-way file sync, and structured sync endpoints (.forge/board.json + board.inbox.jsonl) so agents read/mutate the board without parsing markdown. Send cards straight to agent terminals. Telegram gateway + Hermes push notifications. Vendored SwiftTerm fork with Warp-style inline path completion and reliable command-completion detection. Unified solid-surface button styling.

item.title: Version 0.1.1
item.description: Editor pane, dev reload overlay, customizable top-bar chips, terminal fixes
